# Twitter:*Created: Wednesday, January 17, 2024 at 9:13:12?AM*<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">T</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">wit</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">ter:</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>

<div><b><span style="font-size: 16px">Tweet 36:</span></b><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 16px">&quotEmbarking on a sales career is like setting sail in dynamic waters. It requires a navigator's precision and a pirate's daring. To all recruiters: we're not just selling products; we're charting unknown territories. ?? #SalesCareer #NavigateSuccess&quot</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 16px">Tweet 37:</span></b><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 16px">&quotIn sales, every no is one step closer to yes. It's a journey of persistence, learning, and unyielding optimism. We're not just creating deals; we're crafting stories of resilience. #Persistence #OptimismInSales&quot</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 16px">Tweet 38:</span></b><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 16px">&quotTransitioning into a sales role? Embrace the change of pace, like a dancer moving to a new rhythm. It's about finding your beat in the symphony of persuasion and strategy. ?? #SalesJourney #EmbraceChange&quot</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 16px">Tweet 39:</span></b><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 16px">&quotSeasons change, and so do sales strategies. Adapting is not just a skill, it's our second nature. To the recruiters looking for flexibility and growth, look no further. ?? #Adaptability #SalesSeasons&quot</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 16px">Tweet 40:</span></b><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 16px">&quotGetting a recruiter's attention means narrating your sales saga, not just listing achievements. Every target met, every deal closed, every satisfied customer is a chapter of your unique story. ? #Storytelling #RecruiterAttention&quot</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 16px">Tweet 41:</span></b><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 16px">&quotTo my fellow sales professionals: our mental strength is our greatest asset. Like a sturdy ship braving the storm, we navigate through objections and rejections with unwavering resolve. ? #MentalStrength #SalesResilience&quot</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 16px">Tweet 42:</span></b><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 16px">&quotQuestioning the sanity of a sales career? Remember, in this maze of targets and KPIs, every twist, turn, and dead end has shaped the master strategist you are today. ?? #SalesStrategy #CareerJourney&quot</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 16px">Tweet 43:</span></b><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 16px">&quotIn sales, every handshake is a promise, and every deal, a mutual respect pact. We're not just closing; we're building relationships founded on trust and integrity. ? #MutualRespect #TrustInSales&quot</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 16px">Tweet 44:</span></b><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 16px">&quotThe life of a sales professional is a blend of art and science. Balancing numbers with genuine human connections, we paint our canvas with deals, bonds, and relentless drive. ?? #ArtOfSales #ScienceOfStrategy&quot</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 16px">Tweet 45:</span></b><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 16px">&quotRemember, behind every successful sales professional is a tale of uncounted nos, numerous maybe-laters, and the relentless pursuit of that exhilarating yes. Keep sailing; your horizon is within reach. ? #RelentlessPursuit #SalesHorizon&quot</span><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></div>
<div><b>Tweet 46:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotGraduates, the world of sales &amp account management awaits your unique spark. Remember, every interaction is a chance to leave a mark, and every challenge, a stepping stone to your personal brand. ? #GraduateToGreatness #PersonalBrand&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 47:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotBuilding a career in customer success isn't just about solving problems; it's about foreseeing them. Anticipate, adapt, and show that your vision extends beyond the immediate. ? #FutureFocused #CustomerSuccess&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 48:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotTo the newly minted professionals: account management is your canvas. Paint it with your commitment to relationships, your strategic insights, and your relentless pursuit of excellence. ? #AccountManagementArtistry #CareerCanvas&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 49:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotIn the realm of sales and customer interactions, authenticity is your most potent tool. Let your personal brand be a reflection of your true self, unapologetically unique and consistently reliable. ? #AuthenticSelf #BrandPower&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 50:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotCustomer success is more than a role; it's a mindset. Approach every client as a partner in progress, every issue as an opportunity for growth, and watch your career soar. ? #GrowthMindset #PartnersInProgress&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 51:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotEmbarking on a career path in sales or account management? Remember, your personal brand is your promise to the world. Make it strong, make it shine, make it yours. ? #BrandPromise #ShineBright&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 52:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotNetworking isn't just about making connections; it's about weaving a fabric of relationships, each thread as strong as your commitment to mutual growth. Weave wisely. ?? #NetworkingNuance #RelationshipWeaving&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 53:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotDear graduates, in the symphony of sales and customer engagement, your personal brand is your unique melody. Compose it with care, play it with passion, and the world will listen. ? #UniqueMelody #BrandSymphony&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 54:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotTo those stepping into the world of customer success: empathy is your superpower. Harness it to understand, engage, and elevate every customer experience. #EmpathyInAction #CustomerChampion&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 55:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotRemember, graduates, your journey in sales or account management is a marathon, not a sprint. Build your personal brand one step at a time, with integrity, innovation, and an unwavering focus on relationships. ???? #MarathonMindset #BrandBuilding&quot</div>

<div><b><span style="font-size: 17px">Tweet 1:</span></b><span style="font-size: 17px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 17px">&quotEmbarking on a new week with a laser focus on #BusinessDevelopment. ? This Monday's goal: 40 insightful dials, 100 crafted emails, and connecting personally with industry peers. #SalesStrategy #MondayMotivation&quot</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 17px">Tweet 2:</span></b><span style="font-size: 17px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 17px">&quotReal talk from the field: sometimes it's about the groundwork. Hit the phones for 80 touches today, sparked dialogues on LinkedIn, and secured a promising appointment. The hustle speaks! #SalesLife #BusinessGrowth&quot</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 17px">Tweet 3:</span></b><span style="font-size: 17px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 17px">&quotBehind every successful deal is a tale of persistence. Reviewing over 400 companies from D&ampB's directory led to strategic dialogues with industry leaders. That's how we build bridges in #TechSales. ? #Networking&quot</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 17px">Tweet 4:</span></b><span style="font-size: 17px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 17px">&quotShoutout to the resilience that #SalesProfessionals show daily. Each 'no' paves the way to a 'yes'. Today, wešre reminded that every call, every email, adds a stitch to the tapestry of success. #Resilience #SalesJourney&quot</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 17px">Tweet 5:</span></b><span style="font-size: 17px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 17px">&quotIn #AccountManagement, it's the little things. Dropped off business cards and treats at several companies today. It's about showing up and staying on the radar. #ClientRelations #SalesTips&quot</span><span style="font-size: 17px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 17px"><br></span></div>
<div><b>Tweet 6:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotDive into the heart of #SalesPersistence. A relentless pursuit of outreach led to a breakthrough dialogue with a key player in tech. Remember, a single conversation can open doors to boundless opportunities. ?? #SalesTalk #OpportunityKnocks&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 7:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotCase study from today's ventures: Connecting with over 400 businesses isn't just a numbers game. It's about crafting narratives that resonate, aligning our solutions to their stories. Thatšs the art of #StrategicSelling. ? #SalesStories&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 8:</b><br></div>
<div>&quot#Reflections from the field: The power of presence can't be underestimated. A simple gesture of leaving business cards and goodies can turn into a warm reception next time around. Always be planting seeds for tomorrowšs harvest. ? #SalesTips #GrowthMindset&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 9:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotToday's win: Unraveling the potential of a single follow-up call. From tentative interest to a scheduled meeting, the journey is all about nurturing the lead with patience and precision. #SalesCycle #ClientJourney&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 10:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotZooming out to see the big picture: Each dayšs efforts in #BusinessDevelopment are like brush strokes on a canvas. Over time, these strokes form the masterpiece of a successful sales portfolio. ?? #BigPicture #SalesStrategy&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 11:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotAnecdote from today: A cold call turned warm with shared laughter over an unexpected joke. Itšs these human moments that bridge gaps and build lasting #BusinessRelationships. #SalesLife #HumanConnection&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 12:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotSpotlight on #Teamwork: Today's progress wouldn't be possible without the collective effort. From the meticulous planning to the seamless execution, every team member plays a pivotal role in writing our success story. ? #TeamSuccess #Collaboration&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 13:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotIn the trenches of #TargetedOutreach, we learned that precision beats power. Tailoring our message to resonate with a specific industry leader led to an engaging conversation that may just bloom into a fruitful partnership. #Precision #SalesTactics&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 14:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotTrue story: A meticulously planned follow-up led to a meaningful connection with a lead who'd been silent. The lesson? Consistency and timing are key players in the #SalesGame. ? #ConsistencyIsKey #FollowUpStrategy&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 15:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotHighlight of the day: Our targeted approach in #AccountManagement is paying off. By focusing on specific needs and delivering tailored solutions, we're not just selling; we're solving. #SolutionSelling #ValueAdd&quot<br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><b>Tweet 16:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotA reminder in #SalesResilience: Faced a tough rejection today. It stings, but each 'no' carves the path a little clearer towards 'yes'. Resilience isnšt just bouncing back, it's bouncing forward. ? #KeepPushing #SalesJourney&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 17:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotBehind every successful sale is an untold story of early mornings and late nights. Today, we celebrate the hustle that goes unnoticed but not unfelt. The #Hustle is real and rewarding. #SalesGrind #Dedication&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 18:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotIn sales, every conversation is a seed planted. Today, a seed sown months ago blossomed into an opportunity. Patience and care in #ClientRelationships always bear fruit. ? #LongGame #SalesVictory&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 19:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotTherešs an art to #Listening in sales. Today, by truly hearing a client's needs, we tailored a pitch that hit home. The deal isnšt just closed, itšs opened a partnership. ? #SalesSuccess #ClientFirst&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 20:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotSales isnšt a solo sport. Todayšs win was a testament to the power of teamwork. A last-minute pivot needed all hands on deck, and the team delivered. Collective effort turns challenges into triumphs. #TeamEffort #WinningTogether&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 21:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotTodayšs mantra: Adaptability. Each client's curveball was a chance to adjust our pitch, proving that flexibility isnšt a trait, itšs a superpower in sales. #AdaptAndOvercome #SalesFlexibility&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 22:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotEmbraced #TechInSales today. Leveraging new tools led to streamlined processes and more personal touches in less time. Technology isnšt cold, itšs the warm handshake reaching further. #SalesInnovation #Efficiency&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 23:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotReflection on rejection: Todayšs 'no' hit hard. But in sales, resilience means finding the lesson in every setback. Itšs not just a missed sale, itšs a roadmap to the next yes. #BounceBack #SalesLessons&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 24:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotToday's #Networking nugget: A chance encounter turned into a lead. Sales is everywhere ą in lines for coffee, in elevator chats. Always be ready to share your story. #EverydaySales #OpportunitiesAbound&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 25:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotAs the sun sets on another sales day, remember that each 'good night' can lead to a 'good morning' filled with opportunity. Sleep recharges more than just our bodies; it rejuvenates our sales spirit. #RestToSellBest #SalesCycle&quot<br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><b>Tweet 26:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotDiving deep into analytics isn't just number-crunching; it's the compass that guides our sales strategy. Today's data gave us the 'X' marking a new opportunity spot. ? #SalesData #OpportunityHunting&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 27:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotEvery 'send' button pressed on a proposal is a mix of hard work and hope. Today, we sent out a big one. Now, we wait, and we hope. But most importantly, we believe. ? #SalesProposal #BelieveInYourWork&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 28:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotRapport is the secret sauce in sales. Today, a casual chat turned into a warm lead. When they say 'people buy from people,' they're not kidding. #RelationshipSelling #SalesTalk&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 29:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotEfficiency in sales means more than doing things quickly; it's about doing the right things, at the right time. Today, prioritizing tasks made all the difference. ?? #SalesEfficiency #RightTiming&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 30:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotToday, a 'thank you' from a satisfied customer reminded me why we do what we do. It's not just about closing deals; it's about opening doors to solutions that make a difference. #CustomerSatisfaction #BeyondTheDeal&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 31:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotStaying curious opens doors. Today's product demo taught us new use cases we hadn't considered. Always be learning; it fuels your sales pitch with passion and knowledge. ? #StayCurious #SalesLearning&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 32:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotA closed door today doesn't mean a closed door tomorrow. Following up on a lead from months ago finally got a positive response. Persistence pays in the sales game. ? #Persistence #SalesFollowUp&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 33:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotToday's obstacle turned into a stepping stone. A difficult client request pushed us to innovate, leading to a new service offering. Obstacles or opportunities? You decide. #Innovation #SalesMindset&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 34:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotSometimes, sales is a waiting game. Today was about patience, as we nurtured leads not yet ripe. The seeds sown today will be the harvests of tomorrow. ? #LeadNurturing #PatiencePays&quot</div>
<div><b>Tweet 35:</b><br></div>
<div>&quotShared success stories in our team meeting today. Celebrating each other's wins boosts morale and drives motivation. Together, we're writing our company's success story. ? #TeamSuccess #Motivation&quot</div>
<div><br></div>

<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">čččččččččččččččččččččččč</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Here is the abstract image representing the concept of 'Mindset in Sales'. Now, letšs create the Twitter thread to accompany this image and engage the community on the topic of mindset in sales:</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">---</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 1:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quotUnveiling the power of mindset in sales with this captivating image. It's time to thread together the mental framework that champions in sales harness daily. Dive in! #SalesMindset #PeakPerformance </span></b><span style="font-size: 21px">??</span><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 2:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot1/ Vision isn't just sight, it's insight. In sales, the ability to predict trends and visualize success is a superpower. How do you cultivate your vision? #SalesVision #StrategicThinking&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 3:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot2/ Growth is a mindset, not just a target. Embracing challenges and learning from them shapes a resilient sales professional. Share a growth moment in your sales career. #GrowthMindset #PersonalDevelopment&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 4:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot3/ Resilience in sales is about bouncing back stronger. Remember, every 'no' is closer to a 'yes'. Tell us about a time when you turned rejection into success. #Resilience #BounceBack&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 5:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot4/ Emotional intelligence is your silent partner in closing deals. Reading emotions and building genuine connections can win you not just clients, but advocates. Thoughts? #EmotionalIntelligence #ClientRelations&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 6:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot5/ Stay ahead of the curve by being a lifelong learner. The best in sales are always students at heart. Whatšs the latest lesson you've learned? #NeverStopLearning #SalesKnowledge&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 7:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot6/ Confidence is the attire of a successful salesperson. It's woven from threads of success and stitched with experiences. How do you wear your confidence? #ConfidentSelling #SalesStyle&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 8:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot7/ Adaptability in sales means dancing to the rhythm of the market. How do you stay agile and ready to pivot? Share your strategy. #AdaptToWin #SalesAgility&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 9:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot8/ Collaborate to innovate. The best sales strategies often come from brainstorming with others. Who do you collaborate with for fresh ideas? #Teamwork #SalesInnovation&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 10:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot9/ A positive mindset can be the sunshine that clears the way for sales success. How do you maintain positivity in the face of challenges? #PositiveMindset #SalesSuccess&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 11:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot10/ Being mindful in sales conversations means truly hearing your client's needs. How has mindfulness played a role in your sales approach? #MindfulSales #ActiveListening&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Closing Tweet:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot11/ Our mindset is the lens through which we see the world of sales. Share how shifting your perspective has transformed your approach. Let's inspire each other! #MindsetMatters #SalesJourney&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">---</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">This thread, paired with the abstract image, is crafted to encourage interaction and self-reflection among sales professionals, creating a space for sharing success stories and effective strategies.</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">ččččččččččččččččččččč</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/png;base64,"/><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>**Tweet 1:**</div>
<div>&quot? Mindset is everything in sales. It's the foundation upon which all your strategies and skills are built. Let's unpack this crucial element in a thread. #SalesMindset #SuccessMindset ?&quot</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>**Tweet 2:**</div>
<div>&quot1/ Vision is the art of seeing what is invisible to others. In sales, this means foreseeing potential obstacles and opportunities before they're apparent. #VisionInSales #StrategicThinking&quot</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>**Tweet 3:**</div>
<div>&quot2/ A growth mindset in sales means embracing challenges, learning from feedback, and understanding that abilities can be developed. How has a growth mindset helped you in sales? #GrowthMindset #SalesGrowth&quot</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>**Tweet 4:**</div>
<div>&quot3/ Resilience is a key part of the sales mindset. Every 'no' can lead to a 'yes'. Share a time when persistence paid off for you. #ResilienceInSales #NeverGiveUp&quot</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>**Tweet 5:**</div>
<div>&quot4/ Emotional intelligence in sales is non-negotiable. The ability to read the room, empathize, and respond appropriately can make or break deals. Thoughts? #EmotionalIntelligence #SalesEQ&quot</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>**Tweet 6:**</div>
<div>&quot5/ Learning is ongoing in sales. Staying current with trends, tools, and techniques is a mindset that keeps top sellers at their peak. How do you stay updated? #LifelongLearning #SalesExcellence&quot</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>**Tweet 7:**</div>
<div>&quot6/ Confidence in sales starts within. Believing in your product, your approach, and yourself influences your customers to believe in you too. #SalesConfidence #BelieveInYourself&quot</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>**Tweet 8:**</div>
<div>&quot7/ Adaptability is a sales mindset essential. The best salespeople pivot with ease between roles, challenges, and industries. Can you relate? #Adaptability #SalesFlexibility&quot</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>**Tweet 9:**</div>
<div>&quot8/ A collaborative mindset can elevate your sales game. Working with others can lead to new ideas and strategies. Who's been integral to your sales success? #Collaboration #TeamworkMakesTheDreamWork&quot</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>**Tweet 10:**</div>
<div>&quot9/ Positivity in sales is contagious. It's about more than just staying upbeat; it's about influencing the outlook of your clients and team. #PositiveThinking #SalesOptimism&quot</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>**Tweet 11:**</div>
<div>&quot10/ Mindful selling means being fully present with your clients, listening deeply, and responding to their needs. How has mindfulness affected your sales approach? #MindfulSelling #PresentMomentAwareness&quot</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>**Closing Tweet:**</div>
<div>&quot11/ Mindset transforms your sales game. It's the invisible force that drives visible success. What mindset shifts have you experienced that changed the way you sell? Share your story. #MindsetShift #SalesTransformation&quot<b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">čččččččččččččččččččččččččččč</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">I can help you craft a Twitter thread inspired by the theme of the video, &quotIf You Really Want It You Will Get It - AudioBook - MindLixir.&quot The thread will touch upon motivation, determination, and the power of a focused mindset.</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">---</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 1:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quotEver heard 'where there's a will, there's a way'? It's not just a saying; it's the core of achieving anything worthwhile. Let's break down how a determined mindset can be your most powerful tool. #MindsetIsKey #Determination </span></b><span style="font-size: 21px">?</span><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 2:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot1/ Desire is the starting point. To get what you really want, first be clear about what it is. Write it down, think about it, dream it. Have you defined your goals today? #Desire #GoalSetting&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 3:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot2/ Belief fuels desire. If you don't believe you can achieve it, you won't. Reinforce your belief daily through affirmations and visualization. What's your affirmation for the day? #Belief #SelfConfidence&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 4:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot3/ Action is belief turned into practice. Take steps every day towards your goal, no matter how small. Remember, Rome wasn't built in a day. What action will you take today? #Action #Persistence&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 5:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot4/ Overcome obstacles. They're not roadblocks, they're stepping stones. Each one is an opportunity to learn and get stronger. Share a challenge you've turned into a victory. #Challenges #Resilience&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 6:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot5/ Adaptability is key. When things don't go as planned, pivot. Flexibility in approach can lead to better paths you hadn't considered. How have you adapted recently? #Adaptability #Flexibility&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 7:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot6/ Keep learning. Knowledge empowers you to make informed decisions and stay ahead of the curve. What's something new you've learned in your field this week? #LifelongLearning #KnowledgeIsPower&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 8:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot7/ Surround yourself with support. Build a network of mentors, peers, and friends who believe in you and your vision. Who's in your corner cheering you on? #SupportNetwork #Community&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 9:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot8/ Reflect and recharge. Regularly take stock of your progress and take care of your mental health. How do you recharge your batteries? #SelfCare #Reflection&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 10:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot9/ Gratitude changes everything. Be thankful for where you are and what you have while striving for more. What are you grateful for today? #Gratitude #Positivity&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 11:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot10/ Persistence is non-negotiable. The road to success is dotted with many tempting parking spots. Keep going. What keeps you moving forward? #Persistence #NeverGiveUp&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Closing Tweet:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot11/ Remember, if you really want something, you'll find a way. If not, you'll find an excuse. Let's ditch the excuses and make it happen. Share your 'want' and how you're going to get it. #NoExcuses #MakeItHappen&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">---</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">This Twitter thread encourages engagement by asking questions and encouraging sharing personal stories, fostering a sense of community and shared motivation.</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">ččččččččččččččččččččččččččč</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">č</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Here is the abstract image representing the concept of 'Mindset in Sales'. Now, let's create a Twitter thread focused on the mindset in sales:</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">---</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 1:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot</span></b><span style="font-size: 21px">?</span><b><span style="font-size: 21px"> Mindset is everything in sales. It's the foundation upon which all your strategies and skills are built. Let's unpack this crucial element in a thread. #SalesMindset #SuccessMindset </span></b><span style="font-size: 21px">?</span><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 2:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot1/ Vision is the art of seeing what is invisible to others. In sales, this means foreseeing potential obstacles and opportunities before they're apparent. #VisionInSales #StrategicThinking&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 3:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot2/ A growth mindset in sales means embracing challenges, learning from feedback, and understanding that abilities can be developed. How has a growth mindset helped you in sales? #GrowthMindset #SalesGrowth&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 4:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot3/ Resilience is a key part of the sales mindset. Every 'no' can lead to a 'yes'. Share a time when persistence paid off for you. #ResilienceInSales #NeverGiveUp&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 5:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot4/ Emotional intelligence in sales is non-negotiable. The ability to read the room, empathize, and respond appropriately can make or break deals. Thoughts? #EmotionalIntelligence #SalesEQ&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 6:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot5/ Learning is ongoing in sales. Staying current with trends, tools, and techniques is a mindset that keeps top sellers at their peak. How do you stay updated? #LifelongLearning #SalesExcellence&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 7:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot6/ Confidence in sales starts within. Believing in your product, your approach, and yourself influences your customers to believe in you too. #SalesConfidence #BelieveInYourself&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 8:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot7/ Adaptability is a sales mindset essential. The best salespeople pivot with ease between roles, challenges, and industries. Can you relate? #Adaptability #SalesFlexibility&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 9:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot8/ A collaborative mindset can elevate your sales game. Working with others can lead to new ideas and strategies. Who's been integral to your sales success? #Collaboration #TeamworkMakesTheDreamWork&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 10:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot9/ Positivity in sales is contagious. It's about more than just staying upbeat; it's about influencing the outlook of your clients and team. #PositiveThinking #SalesOptimism&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 11:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot10/ Mindful selling means being fully present with your clients, listening deeply, and responding to their needs. How has mindfulness affected your sales approach? #MindfulSelling #PresentMomentAwareness&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Closing Tweet:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot11/ Mindset transforms your sales game. It's the invisible force that drives visible success. What mindset shifts have you experienced that changed the way you sell? Share your story. #MindsetShift #SalesTransformation&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">---</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">This thread is designed to engage your followers, prompt them to share their experiences, and foster a community around the art of selling. Each tweet invites interaction and reflection, helping to establish you as a thought leader in the sales space.</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">ččččččččččččččččččččččččč</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">ččč</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">To leverage your Twitter profile and engage with your audience effectively, considering the insights from the images you've shared, you could create a series of tweets that foster conversation and highlight your expertise in B2B, strategic growth, and data-driven dialogues. Here are some tweet ideas:</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 1:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quotCrafting a B2B legacy is an art and science. What's one lesson you've learned that's been a game-changer for your strategy? #B2BLegacy #StrategicGrowth&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 2:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quotData speaks, but do we listen? Share an instance where data led to a surprising business insight for you. #DataToDialogue #B2BInnovator&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 3:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quotMeasurable success is the best kind. What metrics do you prioritize to gauge your growth? #MeasureSuccess #GrowthMetrics&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 4:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quotIn the world of B2B, relationships are currency. How do you build and maintain trust with your clients? #B2BRelationships #ClientTrust&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 5:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quotTurning data into dialogues isn't just about analytics; it's about storytelling. How do you turn dry data into compelling narratives? #DataStorytelling #B2BStrategy&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 6:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quotStrategic growth often requires tough choices. What's one pivot you've made that paid off more than you expected? #GrowthPivot #BusinessStrategy&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 7:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quotLet's talk innovation in B2B. What's the most innovative approach you've seen or implemented recently? #B2BInnovation #BusinessTrends&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 8:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quotEthical business is foundational to sustainable success. How do you ensure your strategies align with your core values? #EthicalBusiness #SustainableSuccess&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 9:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quotAchieving measurable success is as much about setting goals as it is about tracking progress. What tools do you use to track your business achievements? #SuccessTools #GoalSetting&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 10:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quotNetworking is key in our industry. Got any upcoming Bay Area events or virtual meetups where B2B leaders can connect? Drop them here! #NetworkingEvent #BayAreaTech&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">By posting tweets like these, you can start meaningful conversations, showcase your expertise, and encourage interaction from your followers and beyond. Remember to engage with the replies to keep the conversations going and build a stronger network.</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">čččččččččččččččččč</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Certainly! Here's an 11-tweet thread designed to engage and build a community of tech professionals in the Silicon Valley/San Francisco Bay Area:</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">---</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 1:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot</span></b><span style="font-size: 21px">?</span><b><span style="font-size: 21px"> Calling all Silicon Valley innovators! Let's kickstart a conversation that turns into a community. If you're pushing the boundaries in tech, this thread is your arena. #SiliconValleyTech #InnovationHub </span></b><span style="font-size: 21px">?</span><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 2:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot1/ What's one tech challenge you've conquered recently? Share your victory, no matter how big or small. Let's celebrate our wins and learn from each other's triumphs! #TechWins #CommunityStrength&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 3:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot2/ Networking is key in our fast-paced world. Drop your best networking tip or your go-to event in the Bay Area. Letšs make connections that matter. #Networking #BayAreaTechEvents&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 4:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot3/ Diversity in tech is crucial. How is your company fostering an inclusive environment? Share initiatives or ideas that have made a difference. #DiversityInTech #InclusionMatters&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 5:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot4/ Startups vs. Giants: What's your take on working at a startup compared to a tech giant in the Valley? Let's discuss the pros and cons. #StartupLife #TechGiants&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 6:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot5/ Sustainability in tech: How are you or your company working towards a greener future? Share projects or practices that prioritize our planet. #SustainableTech #GreenInnovation&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 7:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot6/ The future of work is here. Remote, hybrid, or in-office č what's your preference and why? Let's navigate the new norms together. #FutureOfWork #WorkCulture&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 8:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot7/ AI is reshaping industries. Share an AI project you're excited about or one that you think will redefine the tech landscape. #AIRevolution #TechTrends&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 9:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot8/ Mentorship matters. If you're willing to mentor or seeking mentorship in #SiliconValley, comment below. Let's build bridges for growth and learning. #Mentorship #TechMentors&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 10:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot9/ What's the last tech book or article that blew your mind? Drop your recommendations and let's create a Bay Area tech reading list. #TechReads #KnowledgeSharing&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 11:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot10/ As we wrap up this thread, remember that a community thrives on participation. Meet-ups, hackathons, forums č let's get involved. Share upcoming events or organize one. #CommunityEngagement #SiliconValleyEvents&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Closing Tweet:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot</span></b><span style="font-size: 21px">?</span><b><span style="font-size: 21px"> This is just the beginning. Follow for more threads and connect with fellow tech enthusiasts. DMs are open for collaboration, ideas, or just a good old tech chat. Let's make the #BayAreaTech community stronger together! </span></b><span style="font-size: 21px">?</span><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">---</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">This series of tweets is aimed to foster interaction, share knowledge, and build a supportive tech community in the Silicon Valley/San Francisco Bay Area. Remember to monitor the thread, engage with replies, and keep the conversation going to maintain community interest and momentum.</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">---</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">This thread outlines a mixture of strategy, personal development, and practical advice, inviting engagement and sharing among tech account managers. Adjust the tweets as necessary to better fit your voice and experience.</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">ččččččččččččččččč</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Creating a Twitter thread that offers value to professionals in account management within the technology sector involves providing actionable insights, personal experiences, and encouraging discussion. Here's a draft thread you could consider:</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">---</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 1:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot</span></b><span style="font-size: 21px">?</span><b><span style="font-size: 21px"> Dive into Account Management in Tech: A Thread </span></b><span style="font-size: 21px">?</span><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Managing accounts in the tech sector is more than just business relationships. It's about understanding evolving needs and technology simultaneously. #TechAccountManagement #B2BTechnology&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 2:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot1/ The first step is always about knowledge. Stay updated with the latest tech trends. Your clients rely on you not just for products, but also for insights that can shape their future strategies. #KnowledgeIsPower #TechTrends&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 3:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot2/ Tailored solutions over generic sales pitches. Each client has unique challenges and goals. Listen more than you speak, and craft solutions that resonate with their specific tech environment. #CustomSolutions #ClientSuccess&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 4:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot3/ Data-driven decision-making is key. Leverage analytics to understand how your clients interact with your products and services. Use this data to predict future needs and proactively suggest solutions. #DataDriven #Analytics&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 5:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot4/ Build trust through transparency. In tech, things move fast and issues arise. Be upfront about challenges and collaborate on solutions. This builds long-term relationships. #TrustInTech #TransparentCommunications&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 6:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot5/ Upskilling is non-negotiable. As an account manager in tech, your learning never stops. Invest in your own growth to bring fresh ideas and perspectives to your clients. #LifelongLearning #Upskill&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 7:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot6/ Use technology to manage relationships. CRMs, communication platforms, and project management tools aren't just for organization; they're for enhancing client engagement. #TechTools #RelationshipManagement&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 8:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot7/ Lastly, don't forget the human touch. Tech is complex, but business is still about people. Celebrate wins with your clients, be there in challenges, and always provide a personal touch. #HumanizingTech #AccountManagement&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">**Tweet 9:**</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">&quot</span></b><span style="font-size: 21px">?</span><b><span style="font-size: 21px"> I'll be expanding on each of these points in upcoming posts, so follow along for deep dives into each strategy. And if you're in #TechAccountManagement, drop your go-to strategy below or tag a colleague who would benefit from this thread!</span></b><span style="font-size: 21px">?</span><b><span style="font-size: 21px"> #TechCommunity&quot</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">---</span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">This thread outlines a mixture of strategy, personal development, and practical advice, inviting engagement and sharing among tech account managers. Adjust the tweets as necessary to better fit your voice and experience.</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>

<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Pillar 2 preview: How do you make every customer feel like your only customer? #CustomerEngagement #CustomerExperience</span></li>

<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">_</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">___________________________</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">_________________________</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		? Exciting announcement: Launching the &quotSeven Basin Growth Matrix&quot series! A journey through 7 pillars of business excellence. First up: Diverse Industry Acumen. Stay tuned! #SevenBasinGrowthMatrix #Innovation</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Pillar 1, Diverse Industry Acumen, is all about leveraging insights from various sectors to fuel growth and innovation. #BusinessStrategy #DiverseIndustry</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		My work at Sense and now at Basin &amp Associates has been shaped by this very pillar, proving its transformative power. #CareerJourney #BusinessGrowth</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		From Google to SurveyMonkey, my roles have taught me the importance of adapting strategies across industries. #Leadership #Adaptability</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		As a Brand Ambassador for Braintrust, I'm applying these lessons to revolutionize the talent network. #Braintrust #DecentralizedEconomy</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		At Basin &amp Associates, we're not settling for the status quo. We're crafting strategies that resonate across multiple sectors. #MarketingStrategy #DigitalMarketing</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Watch how we leverage tech like HubSpot and Apollo to create a ripple effect in Construction, Property Management, and Real Estate Development. #TechInnovation #RealEstate</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Join me as we unveil our 90-day strategic blueprint, designed to align with the diversity of the industries we serve. #StrategicPlanning #GrowthMindset</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Every step we take is about aligning with the ever-evolving landscape of business, staying ahead of the curve. #BusinessDevelopment #FutureOfWork</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		I'm inviting recruiters, innovators, and Silicon Valley's finest to join this exploration of industry acumen. #SiliconValley #Networking</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		The second pillar is next: Strategic Customer Engagement. It's about turning every interaction into a lasting relationship. #CustomerEngagement #CRM</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Stay tuned as I break down how personalized engagement strategies can transform your client relationships. #Personalization #BusinessTips</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Pillar 3 will explore Empowering Leadership, where command gives way to empowerment and growth. #LeadershipDevelopment #TeamBuilding</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Upcoming: Pillar 4, Relationship-Centric Strategy, where we dive into the heart of business successčtrust-based relationships. #RelationshipManagement</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Keep an eye out for Pillar 5, where we'll talk about Innovation-Driven Career Aspirations and staying ahead in the market. #CareerGoals #Innovation</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Pillar 6, Holistic Partnership Building, will show why transactions are just the beginning of meaningful collaborations. #Partnerships #BusinessEthics</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		And Pillar 7, Adaptive Resilience, will teach us how to remain agile and confident through the winds of change. #Resilience #Adaptability</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		This series isn't just about sharing knowledge; it's about fostering a community where we grow together. #Community #CollectiveSuccess</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		I'm thrilled to take you on this journey, sharing insights, and learning from each other. #LearningJourney #BusinessExcellence</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Join the conversation, share your thoughts, and let's navigate the path to innovation and success together. #Engage #GrowTogether</span><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></li>
</ul>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">čččččččččččččččččččč</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		? As we step into 2024, I'm excited to guide you through the &quotSeven Basin Growth Matrix&quot. First up, let's dive into the world of Diverse Industry Acumen. #BusinessDevelopment </span><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></li>
</ul>
<div><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Diverse Industry Acumen has been my north star, influencing my approach at Sense and now shaping the culture at Basin &amp Associates. #Leadership #GrowthMindset</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		At Sense, we wove Business Development and Account Management into a multifaceted strategy, going beyond typical roles to build robust relationships. #BusinessStrategy #CustomerSuccess</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		This approach wasnšt just a mix of roles, but a strategic fusion powered by insights across industries, focusing on exceptional customer relations. #CustomerEngagement #IndustryInsights</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		With Basin &amp Associates, our vision expanded. We aimed to not just retain clients but to deepen and broaden our engagements with them. #ClientRetention #BusinessGrowth</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Implementing tools like HubSpot and Apollo, we didn't just adopt new tech ą we made it central to our holistic business development strategy. #TechTools #BusinessTech</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Our digital marketing and LinkedIn activities were carefully crafted to reflect our unique value in every conversation. #DigitalMarketing #BrandValue</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		By immersing ourselves in sectors like Construction and Real Estate, we fortified our strategies with a rich tapestry of best practices. #RealEstate #ConstructionIndustry</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Our 90-day strategic plan is a testament to our commitment to diverse industry engagement, aligning closely with the industries we serve. #StrategicPlanning #Innovation</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Starting with Market Research &amp Customer Segmentation, we used our extensive industry knowledge to understand our clients' unique needs. #MarketResearch #CustomerSegmentation</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		In Sales Operations &amp Social Media Strategy, we crafted stories that resonated across platforms, engaging a diverse audience with precision. #SalesOperations #SocialMediaStrategy</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Our Sales Funnel &amp CRM systems are built on industry best practices, ensuring a smooth and efficient client experience. #SalesFunnel #CRM</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		With Data-Driven Content &amp Sales Analytics, we're constantly refining our approach to guarantee impactful and informed interactions. #DataDriven #SalesAnalytics</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		The foundation of Diverse Industry Acumen sets us up to explore the remaining six pillars of the Basin Growth Matrix. #GrowthMatrix #BusinessPhilosophy</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Each pillar addresses a key challenge in today's business world and contributes to substantial growth and innovation. #BusinessChallenges #Innovation</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Join me on Substack as we delve deeper into each pillar, starting with the insights gained from Diverse Industry Acumen. #Substack #IndustryAcumen</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Together, let's collaborate, share stories, and build a knowledge-rich community that thrives on mutual success. #CommunityBuilding #SharedKnowledge</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Išm looking forward to sharing this journey with you, as we uncover the nuances of each pillar and apply them to our growth. #Journey #ProfessionalGrowth</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		If you're ready to elevate your business acumen and join a community of forward-thinkers, subscribe to Basin &amp Associates. #Subscribe #BusinessCommunity</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 16px">		Letšs begin this transformative journey together. Subscribe now and be part of a movement redefining industry standards. [Subscribe and Begin the Journey] #Transformation #IndustryLeaders</span></li>
</ul>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 15px">ččččččččččččččččččččččč</span></b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? Client Win: Turned a cold lead into a warm partnership over a shared love of coffee. Sometimes, it's the little beans that brew the biggest deals. #ClientEngagement </span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></li>
</ul>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? Hand Raiser: When you change your sales strategy, and it clicks, it feels like unlocking a new level in the ultimate game of #BusinessDevelopment.</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? Charting the growth from a handshake to a signed contract ą every data point tells a story of persistence and strategy. #SalesJourney #GrowthChart</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? The secret ingredient to successful sales? A dash of intuition, a sprinkle of data, and a whole lot of listening. #SalesRecipe #ClientFocus</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? When your sales team syncs up perfectly, and you hit those targets like a well-oiled machine. That's the #TeamworkDreamwork in action!</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? In sales, every client is a different book. Some are thrillers, some are mysteries, but all are page-turners waiting to be understood. #ClientDiversity #SalesStories</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? Fitting the pieces of customer needs and product features together ą the true puzzle master's job in sales. #SolutionSelling #PuzzlePiece</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? Every 'no' in sales gets you closer to understanding your customer's mind. It's a 'not yet' that fuels your strategy. #SalesMindset #LearningCurve</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? The most successful sales strategy? Being genuinely interested in solving problems, not just pushing products. #AuthenticSales #ProblemSolving</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		?? On the mic: Sharing tales from the sales trenches. It's not just about deals; it's about the human stories behind them. #SalesTales #Storytelling</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		???? Client Win: Uncovered a hidden need during a routine check-in call, and voila, upsell opportunity spotted and secured! #UpsellStrategy #ClientDiscovery</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? &quotNavigating the new work landscape? #Braintrust is the compass leading enterprises to elite talent. It's a game-changer for HR and recruiting. #FutureOfWork #TechTalent&quot</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? &quotHR pros, say goodbye to long hiring cycles. With Braintrust, match with pre-vetted tech talent in a flash. Efficiency is just the beginning. #HRTech #Recruiting&quot</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? &quotTop 2% talent, up to 90% lower fees ą Braintrust isn't just a platform; it's a revolution in talent acquisition. #CostEffective #QualityHiring&quot</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? &quotBuilding a team in the digital age requires new tools. Braintrust is where quality and innovation meet to elevate your talent pool. #TeamBuilding #Innovation&quot</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? &quotLeading enterprises trust Braintrust to fuel their talent engine. Ready to join the movement? #EnterpriseHiring #BraintrustNetwork&quot</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? &quotFor recruiters on the hunt for exceptional talent, Braintrust offers a new pathway. Diverse, top-tier, and ready to innovate. #RecruitmentStrategy #TopTalent&quot</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? &quotThe future of work is evolving, and so is talent management. Braintrust is at the forefront, transforming how we connect with professionals. #WorkEvolution #TalentManagement&quot</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? &quotAI-powered matching means you're only a click away from the ideal candidate. Braintrust is changing the game for recruiters and talent alike. #AIRecruiting #EfficientHiring&quot</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? &quotAs a Brand Ambassador for Braintrust, I'm witnessing first-hand the shift towards a more agile, talent-focused work culture. Let's explore this together. #BraintrustAmbassador #WorkplaceInnovation&quot</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? &quotHR and recruitment professionals, it's time to elevate your strategy. Braintrust offers the platform to make it happen. #StrategicHiring #HRInnovation&quot</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		?? &quotLet's talk about the seismic shifts in recruitment and how platforms like Braintrust are crafting the workforce of tomorrow. #RecruitmentTalk #FutureOfWorkforce&quot</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? &quotIn our global work community, Braintrust breaks barriers, connecting talent and companies across borders. #GlobalTalent #WorkWithoutBorders&quot</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? &quotCurious how Braintrust could change your hiring process? Let's dive into a conversation about efficient, quality-driven recruitment. #BraintrustEffect #HiringDiscussion&quot</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? &quotFor talent ready to take the leap, Braintrust is the launchpad. For companies, it's the destination for top tech professionals. #CareerGrowth #HiringPlatform&quot</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? &quotNew to the recruiting game or looking to shake things up? Discover how Braintrust is redefining the art of connecting talent. #RecruitingInnovation #HRTransformation&quot</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? &quotBraintrust: where the challenge of finding great talent meets the satisfaction of instant, quality matches. #WinningAtRecruiting #TalentDiscovery&quot</span></li>

<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? &quotSustainable hiring starts with platforms like Braintrust that understand the value of quality and efficiency. #SustainableRecruiting #SmartHiring&quot</span></li>

<div><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">________________________</span><span style="font-size: 21px">_____________________________</span><span style="font-size: 21px">___</span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">Leveraging the latest #SalesTech to transform our approach, because who says a good old sales rep can't be a tech whiz too? #TechSavvySales </span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? Hitting the bullseye in #B2BSales means aligning the dart of your solution with the board of client needs. Aim with insight, throw with precision. </span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? Every closed door in sales is just a wall waiting for a window. Find it, open it, and let the opportunities breeze in. #PersistencePays </span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? &quotYou miss 100% of the sales you don't discuss.&quot ą Adapted from a wise hockey player's philosophy on shots. #SalesTalk </span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></li>
</ul>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? Case Study: Discover how redefining our value proposition led to a 30% uplift in client retention. It's all in the messaging! #ValueProposition </span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></li>
</ul>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? Client Win: Our latest strategy led to a partnership with an industry leader, proving that the right pitch can open grand doors. #ClientAcquisition </span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></li>
</ul>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? That magical moment when a client nods during your pitch ą not because they agree, but because they get it. #PitchPerfect </span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? Sales is a narrative, and every customer interaction is a chapter. Write it well, and they'll stick around for the sequel. #StorySelling #NarrativeSales</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? Sustainable sales aren't just about green products; it's about planting seeds of trust that grow into forests of loyalty. #SustainableGrowth </span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></li>
</ul>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? From SMB to the enterprise, every deal is a skyscraper built from the ground up. Lay strong foundations with trust and value. #BuildingRelationships </span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">		? Analyzing client data is like detective work where every clue leads to a more personalized sale. Call me Sherlock Holmes of #SalesData. </span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></li>
</ul>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
